---
title: "Legacy notice: brown-shrimp compatibility fixture"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Legacy notice: brown-shrimp compatibility fixture}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

The brown-shrimp objects are unpublished compatibility fixtures retained for
internal benchmark continuity. They are not an active freqTLS teaching example
and are intentionally absent from case-study navigation, current comparison
tables, and discovery indexes.

Use the canonical empirical sequence instead: oxygen-gradient zebrafish,
cereal aphids, Snow-gum PSII, and the mortality and awake/coma *Drosophila
suzukii* examples. The historical data objects have not been deleted or
deprecated in this phase.
